2e55597db578743a.summary: Across seven dev builds this week, Compose Multiplatform advanced two parallel trains: the 1.12.10-alpha01 line (dev4413 through dev4443) heading toward the next minor, and the 1.12.0-beta02 line stabilizing the imminent stable release. The changes were incremental — layout and rendering fixes across iOS and Desktop, plus compiler-plugin and runtime tweaks — with no API-visible features. The tag above is the head of the alpha train; the beta builds are folded in below.
